title: Unable to use template functions in "inspect" command
body:
### Issue Description

I expected every `--format template` to have similar capabilities. However, I can use the `json` template function when I call `buildah images`, but not when I call `buildah inspect`.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue:

```console
$ buildah docker.io/library/alpine
Trying to pull docker.io/library/alpine:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob d69d4d41cfe2 done   |
Copying config 2abc5e8340 done   |
Writing manifest to image destination
2abc5e83407155714f171c293f197e1310176959e106f8ad63ffa2e7e9635d4a

$ buildah images --format '{{ . | json }}' docker.io/library/alpine
{"Tag":"latest","ID":"2abc5e834071","Name":"docker.io/library/alpine","Digest":"sha256:8a1f59ffb675680d47db6337b49d22281a139e9d709335b492be023728e11715","Created":1748622041,"CreatedAt":"3 weeks ago","Size":"8.81 MB","CreatedAtRaw":"2025-05-30T16:20:41Z","ReadOnly":false,"History":"<none>"}

$ buildah inspect --format '{{ . | json }}' docker.io/library/alpine
Error: Template parsing error: template: format:1: function "json" not defined
```

### Describe the results you received

An error about the lack of template functions.

### Describe the results you expected

I expected a very detailed account of the image in JSON format.

### buildah version output

```yaml
Version:         1.39.4
Go Version:      go1.23.6 (Red Hat 1.23.6-2.el9_6)
Image Spec:      1.1.0
Runtime Spec:    1.2.0
CNI Spec:        1.1.0
libcni Version:
image Version:   5.34.3
Git Commit:
Built:           Fri Mar 28 16:32:02 2025
OS/Arch:         linux/arm64
BuildPlatform:   linux/arm64/v8
```

```yaml
    }

```

### Provide your storage.conf

```toml
n/a
```

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

Ultimately, I intended to view the environment of the image as JSON. Like the example in `buildah inspect --help` but transformed to JSON:

```console
$ buildah inspect --help
…
Examples:
  buildah inspect containerID
  buildah inspect --type image imageID
  buildah inspect --format '{{.OCIv1.Config.Env}}' alpine
…

$ buildah inspect --format '{{ .OCIv1.Config.Env | json }}' docker.io/library/alpine
```
